title: astragalus tetrastichus
intro: Astragalus tetrastichus, also known as Four-stemmed Milk-vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus tetrastichus include improving immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections and other conditions. Herbal preparations of Astragalus tetrastichus include teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
